findings.evidence: Lines 63-66 and 74-77 contain the same `Real.sq_sqrt ... map_natCast` proof and the same `not_isSquare_prod_primes p (fun i _ => hp i) (fun i _ j _ hij h => hij (hinj h)) hS` construction.
findings.fix: Factor the repeated witnesses into private lemmas, or derive the cardinality corollary through the already-defined prime equivalence / shared helper so the distinct-primes independence proof has one maintenance point.
findings.issue: `card_aut_adjoin_sqrt_primes` repeats the same square-root witness and prime square-class-independence proof already used in `galoisGroupEquivSqrtPrimes`, including the `not_isSquare_prod_primes` lambda.

summary: The proofs are mostly readable, but the prime corollaries duplicate the same nontrivial hypothesis construction instead of factoring it once.
